name: Rhino Prime
description: Takes Rhino's ground-shaking abilities to the next level with altered mod polarities that offer greater customization.
passiveDescription: Emit a shockwave dealing |DAMAGE| damage after landing from a great height.

abilities.name: Rhino Charge
abilities.description: Rhino charges towards a target, clobbering any in his path and goring his victim.

abilities.name: Iron Skin
abilities.description: Rhino hardens his skin, insulating himself from all damage and gaining Overguard.

abilities.name: Roar
abilities.description: Grants all nearby Warframes increased damage for a short duration.

abilities.name: Rhino Stomp
abilities.description: Rhino stomps with force sufficient to disrupt time, tumbling enemies around him in stasis.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: Takes Rhino's ground-shaking abilities to the next level with altered mod polarities that offer greater customization.

components.name: Chassis
components.description: Chassis component of the Rhino Prime Warframe.

components.name: Neuroptics
components.description: Neuroptics component of the Rhino Prime Warframe.

components.name: Orokin Cell
components.description:
Ancient energy cell from the Orokin era.

Location: Ceres, Saturn, and Deimos

components.name: Systems
components.description: Systems component of the Rhino Prime Warframe.

patchlogs.name: Echoes of Veilbreaker: Hotfix 32.1.2
patchlogs.changes: Adjusted more offsets for the Shard Bane Ephemera on Nidus, Gendel, Chroma, Lavos, Frost, Hildryn, Atlas, Rhino, Ash, and Vauban.

patchlogs.name: Veilbreaker: Update 32
patchlogs.changes:
In Update 31.2, we buffed a number of underused Warframe augments. The time has come to continue this work! This batch tackles Warframes from Loki to Rhino (of which there are surprisingly many!). We have increased their viability in missions, which we hope will  encourage more build diversity.
Swapped Volt Specter Junction location (Venus to Mercury) with Rhino Specter (Earth to Venus).

patchlogs.name: Echoes of the Zariman: Update 31.6
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Rhino’s Iron Skin VFX not applying properly to all (except the Palatine) Rhino Skins.  
Fixed motion blur issues on Rhino’s Iron Skin.

patchlogs.name: Angels of the Zariman: Hotfix 31.5.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Warframe abilities (notably Rhino’s Iron Skin with the Iron Shrapnel Augment equipped) being activated while using the 1,2,3,4 keys to select Armament Turrets in Void Armageddon missions.

patchlogs.name: Angels of the Zariman: Hotfix 31.5.1
patchlogs.changes:
Changed the Saryn Voidshell Skin default emissive color to match the Rhino Voidshell and Volt Voidshell skins.
Fixed script error related to Rhino’s Rhino Charge ability.

patchlogs.name: Update 31.5: Angels of the Zariman
patchlogs.changes:
In this update, we are debuting the first round of Voidshell Skins featuring Saryn, Volt, and Rhino! Each of these following skins are available in the in-game Market and come with their own Material Structure:
Rhino Voidshell Skin

patchlogs.name: Echoes of War: Banshee & Mirage Prime Vault: Hotfix 31.1.3
patchlogs.changes: Banshee Prime, Mirage Prime, Euphona Prime, Kogake Prime, Akbolto Prime, Helios Prime, and Deconstructor Prime Relics have been added to the drop tables! These Relics have replaced the Rhino Prime & Nyx Prime, Relics in the Void drop tables, Bounties, and Relic Packs.

patchlogs.name: The New War: Hotfix 31.0.11
patchlogs.changes: Regal Aya is no longer purchasable from Varzia and Aya has been removed from the drop tables and replaced with Nyx Prime and Rhino Prime Relics.

patchlogs.name: Update 30.7: Nidus Prime & Plague Star
patchlogs.changes: Fixed Rhino’s Rhino Stomp perpetually stunning both Kuva Liches and Sisters of Parvos.
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed a script error related to Rhino’s Iron Skin.
Fixed a script error when casting Rhino’s Roar ability.

patchlogs.name: Nightwave: Prime Vault: Hotfix 30.6.1
patchlogs.changes:
Rhino Prime returns alongside his Prime Weapons and exclusive Customizations for a limited time. With Nyx Prime already available to earn through Void Storm Missions, there are now even more opportunities to obtain this deadly psychic Warframe and her Prime Accessories.
Rhino Prime, Nyx Prime, Ankyros Prime, Boltor Prime, Hikou Prime, and Scindo Prime Relics have been added to the drop tables! These Relics have replaced the Zephyr and Chroma Prime Relics in the Void drop tables, Bounties, and Relic Packs.
Rhino Prime
Rhino & Nyx Prime Glyphs
Rhino Prime
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Rhino Roar buff becoming permanent on other players if they become nullified while the buff is on them.

patchlogs.name: Call of the Tempestarii: Hotfix 30.0.6
patchlogs.changes: Swapped the crafting requirement of Control Module for Gallium in Rhino Systems Blueprint to ease early player acquisition.

patchlogs.name: Derelict Shift: Hotfix 28.3.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a script error when casting Rhino’s Rhino Stomp Ability.

patchlogs.name: Warframe Revised: Railjack Revisited (Part 1): Hotfix 27.4.4

patchlogs.name: Warframe Revised: Railjack Revisited (Part 1): Update 27.4
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Emblems on Rhino Prime and Wukong Prime equipped with any TennoGen skin (except for Vojnik for Rhino) sitting too far off from the shoulders with Prime details toggled off. 
Fixed Rhino Stomp, Convergence Orbs, and the Ignis shooting FX appearing translucent when Adaptive Exposure is enabled. As reported here: https://forums.warframe.com/topic/1119942-semi-transparent-objectstextures-almost-invisible/

patchlogs.changes: Rhino: 190 to 225

patchlogs.name: Empyrean: Ivara Prime 27.0.9
patchlogs.changes: Our intent is to make Railjack weapons more effective on their own. As such, Rhino’s Roar and Saryn’s Toxic Lash no longer unintentionally affect Railjack weapons, as per [DE]Marcus’ post here:
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Heartwood Armor set clipping with Rhino.

patchlogs.name: Saint of Altra: Update 25.7.0

patchlogs.name: The Sacrifice: Prime Vault Hotfix 23.1.2!
patchlogs.fixes:
Nyx Prime and Rhino Prime are back!
For the first time ever, the hypnotic Nyx Prime is leaving the Vault! Charging out beside her is Rhino Prime along with other high-demand Vaulted Prime Accessories, Prime Weapons and discounted Platinum.
Rhino Prime

patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed a plethora of Syandanas clipping through Equinox’s Insomnia Skin, and Rhino/Rhino Prime.

patchlogs.name: Hydroid Prime: Update 21.6.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Hulta Armor clipping into Rhino Prime.

patchlogs.name: Chains of Harrow: Hotfix 21.5.2

patchlogs.name: Chains of Harrow: Hotfix 21.3.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Iron Skin on Rhino Prime being incorrectly colored.

patchlogs.name: Chains of Harrow: Update 21.3.0
patchlogs.changes: Optimized Rhino’s Iron Skin shader to reduce the per-pixel cost by about 10%.

patchlogs.name: Chains of Harrow: Hotfix 21.0.7
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a script error when casting Rhino’s Charge.

patchlogs.name: Update 21: Chains of Harrow
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed various Syandana clipping issues for Rhino.

patchlogs.name: Oberon Prime: Hotfix 20.7.1
patchlogs.changes: The Health Conversion Mod now activates upon taking damage instead of getting hit. Previously, Warframes (like Valkyr, Rhino or Nezha) that have abilities that make themselves invincible to damage, were consuming the conversion when hit even though no damage was being done due to invincibility. This rendered the Health Conversion Mod rather useless, and has since been changed to improve functionality.

patchlogs.name: Oberon Prime: Update 20.7.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Zaikya Syandana sitting incorrectly on Rhino and Rhino Prime.

patchlogs.name: Octavia’s Anthem: Hotfix 20.2.3
patchlogs.changes: Friendly Archwing markers, Atlas, Rhino, Valkyr’s custom HUD and Inaros’ resurrect HUD are now affected by the HUD scaling sliders in the Interface options.
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Dendra Shoulder Guards sticking out too far on Rhino's left arm.

patchlogs.name: Octavia’s Anthem: Update 20.2.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Dex Nouchali Syandana clipping on Rhino and Chroma.

patchlogs.name: Octavia's Anthem: Update 20.1.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a script error when casting Rhino’s Charge.

patchlogs.name: Octavia's Anthem: Hotfix 20.0.9
patchlogs.changes: Tweaked the Abilities screen for Mirage’s Eclipse and Rhino’s Roar to show damage increase and reduction as a % to match the formatting of the HUD indicator in-game.

patchlogs.name: Octavia's Anthem: Hotfix 20.0.6
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Player List HUD display for abilities with decreasing timer buffs (Rhino’s Roar for example) not counting down on affected Squad members.

patchlogs.name: Octavia's Anthem: Update 20
patchlogs.changes:
Changed Rhino’s Roar to only buff non-Tenno allies with a weapon -
Rhino's Roar duration increased in Conclave.
Rhino's Stomp damage increased and speed debuff reduced in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Update 19.13.0
patchlogs.changes:
Rhino no longer has a Mastery Rank requirement! Previous to this change, Rhino required a Mastery Rank of 2 to use. Since Rhino is the first Warframe accessible by boss drops, we have removed the Mastery Rank to improve the new player experience. 
Replaced Orokin Cell with Gallium, and replaced Neural Sensors with Morphics as a crafting requirement in the Rhino Blueprint. This is also in the interest of using Rare Resources found on earlier planets to allow for Rhino to be crafted earlier on!

patchlogs.name: Banshee Prime: Hotfix 19.11.5 + 19.11.6
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Clients being able to toggle off Rhino’s Iron Skin with Iron Shrapnel immediately after casting.

patchlogs.name: The Glast Gambit: Hotfix 19.11.4
patchlogs.changes: Rhino’s Roar buff HUD indicator now displays added damage buff amount (it shows up briefly up top just like Trinity’s Blessing %).

patchlogs.name: The Glast Gambit: Hotfix 19.9.2 (Phase One: DB Upgrades)
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a script error when casting Rhino’s Rhino Charge.

patchlogs.name: Update 19: The War Within
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed some enemies being able to apply a Status Effect through invulnerability abilities such as Rhino’s Iron Skin and Nezha’s Warding Halo.

patchlogs.name: Recurring Dreams: Hotfix 3
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a script error when casting Rhino’s Charge ability.

patchlogs.name: The Index Preview: Hotfix #4
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Clients being unable to hack lock down panels after using numerous Rhino abilities in a row before attempting to hack.

patchlogs.name: The Index Preview: Hotfix #3
patchlogs.changes: Smoothed out frame-time spikes from Rhino Stomp; when surrounded by a lot of enemies it could end up adding 3-4ms on a very fast PC (this occurred once when cast and once to apply time-dilation).
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Nyx’ Chaos and Rhino’s Iron Skin causing a script error upon cast.

patchlogs.name: The Index Preview
patchlogs.changes:
Conclave Arsenal now has Ability descriptions specific to Conclave for the following Frames: Ash, Banshee, Hydroid, Inaros, Ivara, Loki, Mag, Mesa, Nekros, Nezha, Nova, Nyx, Rhino, Saryn, Titania, Valkyr, Vauban and Volt.
Decreased decay delay and increased decay rate of Rhino’s Iron Skin in Conclave.
Optimized Rhino’s Stomp ability to help alleviate performance issues.

patchlogs.name: The Silver Grove: U1.2 + U1.3
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Chargers and Zanuka remaining permanently frozen after Rhino’s Rhino Stomp ability.

patchlogs.name: The Silver Grove
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Rhino being able to activate his heavy landing Passive on all ground slams.

patchlogs.name: Specters of the Rail: Hotfix 4
patchlogs.changes: Rebalanced the Rhino Specter in the Junction to be more manageable for new players.

patchlogs.name: Update 18.11.0 & 18.11.1
patchlogs.changes: •    Improved Rhino Prime’s Iron Skin to appear more metallic.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.10.6
patchlogs.changes: •    Rhino Prime’s Iron Skin will now reflect your chosen accent color instead of energy color.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.10.5
patchlogs.additions: •    Rhino Prime’s Iron Skin has received the PBR treatment! This also allows Iron Skin to reflect your chosen energy color. (Default is still gold!)

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.10.4 Operation Rathuum.
patchlogs.changes: Tweaked Rhino’s default energy color to be slightly more blue.

patchlogs.name: Update 18.10.0: Operation Rathuum!
patchlogs.fixes: we've added PBR Upgrades on Nyx Prime, Ember Prime, Rhino Prime, and Excalibur Prime!

patchlogs.name: Update 18.5: Sands of Inaros
patchlogs.fixes:
Palatine Rhino, Nemesis Nyx, and The Corpus have new Profile Icons!
Increased the range of Rhino’s Stomp in Conclave.
Rhino’s Charge will no longer ragdoll boss-type enemies.
Rhino’s Stomp will no longer put boss-type enemies in stasis.
Atlas’s Landslide and Rhino’s Charge now have a 0.8x energy multiplier per successive hit.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.4.12: Saryn Prime
patchlogs.changes: Infested Sorties will no longer generate Hijack Sortie Missions because their tiny baby claws are too small to reach the core.Convergence will always spawn moving towards an objective to help reduce unnecessary backtracking.Gravity has been disabled for Convergence pickups, keeping their appearance predictable..Steel Meridian’s General Sacrifice has been changed from Rhino Prime Helmet to Trinity Prime Helmet.The Rift and its interaction with hacking terminals has now been consistently applied to be not-hackable. You may have noticed the inconsistency in Rifted targets ability to interact with hacking panels. While his Rift-based skillset does offer some unique opportunities for players one major issue discussed within the community has been determining what are the 'rules' Limbo's Riftwalking follows. Keeping this in mind players can expect future updates to contain adjustments to Limbo, enemies, and interactable elements of the environment, to help make playing Limbo a more consistent experience.  We will continue to monitor Limbo's unique interactive mechanic and its effect on gameplay, and will let you know should any other changes be necessary. Stay tuned for a Dev Workshop!

patchlogs.name: Update 18.1.0
patchlogs.changes:
Rhino 
Adjusted the audio FX of Rhino’s Roar.
Self-damage will no longer increase Rhino’s Iron Skin damage buffer.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.0.4
patchlogs.changes: Reduced the effectiveness of Rhino’s Iron Skin in PvP.

patchlogs.name: Update 18: The Second Dream
patchlogs.changes:
Rhino has been given a passive: Heavy Impact!
Rhino Charge has received the following changes:Rhino Charge can now gore enemies caught in his path!
Rhino Charge now has a re-cast combo counter (mechanically identical to Valkyr's Ripline and Atlas' Landslide).
Duration mods no longer affect Rhino's Charge.
Range mods will now affect Rhino Charge's distance.
Rhino Charge’s distance is now based on his Ability combo counter.
Rhino Charge will now result in a Blast proc on targets if Iron Skin is active while Charging.
Rhino Charge will deal double damage against targets affected by Rhino Stomp.
Rhino Stomp has received the following changes:Fixed 'double getup' when enemies affected by Rhino Stomp get ragdolled.
Rhino Stomp is recastable now and  picks up new enemies in range.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 17.12.1
patchlogs.changes: Improved the tintability of metal texture on the Rhino Palatine Deluxe Skin.
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed incorrect badge placement on the Rhino Palatine Deluxe Skin.
Fixed a visual error on Rhino’s Iron Skin when using the Rhino Palatine Deluxe Skin.
Fixed a visual error causing Rhino’s Iron Skin to turn black in some tilesets when using the Palatine Deluxe Skin.

patchlogs.name: Update 17.12.0
patchlogs.changes: Rhino Palatine Skin: Pay homage to warriors of a more chivalrous time with this skin.

patchlogs.changes: Reduced the damage of Rhino’s Iron Shrapnel Augment in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 17.6.2

patchlogs.name: Update 17.1.0 - 17.1.4
patchlogs.fixes: • Fixed Oberon and Rhino always having a Cernos equipped as per: https://forums.warframe.com/index.php?/topic/461224-cernos-bow-wont-leave-my-oberons-left-hand/

patchlogs.name: Update 17: Echoes Of The Sentient

Rhino's Charge damage and range has been reduced in PvP.
Knock down added to Rhino’s Charge in PvP.
Rhino's Roar duration has been increased and range decreased in PvP.
The following changes have been made for all of Warframe’s game modes:Rhino Prime base armor increased from 190 to 275.

Rhino’s Charge will now toss enemies into the air when hit, ragdolling them.
Rhino’s Roar will now last 30 seconds, regardless of rank.
Duration Mods can now buff the duration enemies spend suspended in mid-air from Rhino’s Stomp.

patchlogs.changes: Revised Rhino’s Iron Skin texture as requested.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 9.3
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Rhino's iron skin effects not being removed on client

patchlogs.name: Update 9: Vor's Revenge
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Rhino's Iron Skin being removed by other players causing damage to it.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 8.3.3
patchlogs.fixes: Fix for Rhino Roar only lasting for 4 seconds.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 8.3.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fix Rhino Roar effects not appearing on client

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 8.3.1
patchlogs.fixes: Added FX to Rhino Roar.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 8.3
patchlogs.changes:
Rhino: Iron Skin 
Rhino Roar: NEW POWER: Radial damage buff for all players within range (10%,15%,25%,50%)
Rhino: Rhino Stomp 
Rolled Radial blast and Rhino Stomp together. Rhino Stomp now does damage to enemies(150,300,500,800)

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 8.0.6
patchlogs.changes: Fix for Rhino Stomp.

patchlogs.name: Update 7.11.0: Vauban!
patchlogs.fixes: Rhino Skin no longer grants full invincibility, but can now reach up to 80% Damage Reduction at highest Mod level.

patchlogs.name: Update 7.9.0: The Glaive
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Rhino Charge and Slash Dash powers framerate dependencies, powers now consistently work as intended.

patchlogs.name: Update 7.7.2: Hotfixes
patchlogs.fixes: + Fixed "power in use bug" with Rhino Stomp.

patchlogs.name: Update 6.5 Hotfixes
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed issue with Rhino Stomp breaking if an enemy is just killed before the stomp.

patchlogs.name: Update 6.3 Hotfixes
patchlogs.fixes:
Boosted Rhino and Frost base sprint by 5%.
Rhino Radial Blast does more damage as it levels.
Rhino Stomp stun length escalates with level increase.

patchlogs.name: Update 6: Hotfixes
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Warframe skins being incorrectly listed as "Rhino Chassis".
